---
title: "Guide"
draft: true
---

1. Add `_quarto-latest.yml`
1. Add `navbar.right` in `_quarto.yml` to get to swith (or put it somewhere else!)
1. Include in `.github/workflows/publish.yml` two "Render" steps, with and without the `QUARTO_PROFILE` environment variable set
1. Do not use quarto-actions/publish; push worktree at `_site` to gh-pages instead
1. Manually add an "index.html" redirect to the root of the gh-pages branch
